The '''Second Battle of Ruusan''' was one of the final battles of the [[New Sith Wars]]. Following the previous engagement over [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], the Republic tried to retake the planet. However, their fleet was defeated by the larger Sith fleet orbiting the world.

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
